A self-contained INI parser and stringifier following the exact same patterns as `TOMLObject.zig` and `JSON5Object.zig`:

## Summary of changes

### 1. `src/bun.js/api/INIObject.zig` *(new file)*
A self-contained INI parser and stringifier following the exact same patterns as `TOMLObject.zig` and `JSON5Object.zig`:

- **`create`** — builds the `Bun.INI` namespace object with `parse` and `stringify` methods
- **`parse`** — iterates over lines, handles CRLF, strips `;`/`#` comments, parses `[section]` headers into nested JS objects, parses `key = value` pairs (trimming whitespace around `=`), throws `SyntaxError` with line numbers on invalid input; all values returned as strings
- **`stringify`** — two-pass approach: first writes top-level primitive values as `key = value\n`, then writes plain objects as `\n[section]\nkey = value\n` blocks; skips arrays, nested objects, symbols, functions

### 2. `src/bun.js/api/BunObject.zig`
Three additions:
- `pub const INI = toJSLazyPropertyCallback(Bun.getINIObject);` in the `BunObject` struct (line 66, near JSONC/TOML/JSON5/YAML)
- `pub fn getINIObject(...)` getter function
- `const INIObject = bun.api.INIObject;` import at the bottom
